## Overview

The Vertiv™ PowerIT Basic rack PDUs (rPDUs) deliver reliable, space-saving power distribution for a wide range of IT environments, with configurations supporting standard, high-density, and high-capacity applications. These high-capacity models provide significantly greater power delivery for racks supporting advanced compute, AI, or other growing power demands. Every unit is 100% tested for functionality and reliability and comes with a standard five-year limited warranty.

## Key Benefits

- **Reliable Power Distribution**: Provides dependable, space-saving, and cost-effective rack-level power.
- **High-Capacity Power Support**: High-density models support up to 277V/480V for advanced compute workloads and growing rack densities.
- **Flexible Configurations**: Available in multiple electrical and receptacle options to support diverse IT environments.
- **Secured Outlets**: Combination C13/C19 receptacles with high-retention, color-coded outlets that are P-Lock cable compatible.
- **Tested & Backed for Reliability**: Individually tested for functionality and compliance (UL, RoHS, China RoHS, TAA) with a five-year limited warranty.

## Best Suited For

- Banking, Financial and Insurance
- Data Center/Colocation/Hosting
- Healthcare
- Retail and Wholesale
- Transportation

## Features

- **High-Density Readiness**: Select models designed for IT, AI, and HPC loads up to 66.4 kVA.
- **Flexible Configuration Options**: Versatile power distribution with outlet types (C13, C19, C13/C19, NEMA) in horizontal and vertical form factors.
- **Upgradable Design**: Basic upgradable rPDUs allow adding monitoring capabilities through Vertiv's upgradable architecture.
- **Quick Setup**: Simple, fast installation in any standard rack or cabinet using included mounting brackets.
- **Warranty & Certifications**: Includes a 5-year limited warranty and TAA compliance.
- **Broad Compatibility**: Fits all industry-standard racks with support for major global voltage and amperage combinations.

## Safety & Compliance

- UL listed for North American units
- ETL, RoHS, and TAA compliant
- Each unit individually tested for full functionality

## Warranty

Vertiv™ PowerIT Basic Rack PDU comes with a standard five-year limited warranty.
